arts.ttl: Injury Update: Bayern Munich’s Daniel Peretz expected to miss two weeks; Javier Fernández back in training
arts.sum: Meanwhile, Hau (via @iMiaSanMia ) also reported that midfielder Javier Fernández is back in training after a long spell on the sidelines due to an ankle injury. Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany check in with some words on Neuer’s status as well (via @iMiaSanMia ).

Bayern Munich are said to be close to agreeing a deal with Lazio that would see youngster Arijon Ibrahimovic move to Italy on a loan with a purchase obligation.

arts.sum: Bayern Munich would do well to use more of its young players... “I don’t count Mathys Tel as a very young player, he’s already played a lot and is more in the Aleks Pavlović category.

arts.sum: Davies figures to play a key part for Bayern Munich in the second of the season. But overall, we know we’re going to go into that game with the same mindset we had in every single game we played last year,” Davies told Bundesliga.com (as captured by @IMiaSanMia ).
